description:
This diagram illustrates the pixel aggregation rules for Grassland Related Change (GRAC) when downscaling from a 10-meter resolution (DLTC 10m) to a 20-meter resolution (DLTC 20m). Each 20m output pixel is derived from a 2x2 block of four 10m input pixels. The diagram provides specific examples of how different combinations of input codes at 10m result in an aggregated code at 20m, indicating a hierarchical or priority-based aggregation logic.

Overriding Rules:
*   Loss of coniferous
